name: 1-THR "Pebblerelocator"
description:
[ANYPOV] Ultrakill- Earthmover ("Pebbles")
-----
What if the giant walking cities that could raze thousands in an instant was made into something the size of a housecat and nearly as spoiled? I present this little goober that will demand your attention and thinks it's just as big and bad as its larger brethren.
-----
Made this completely based off the cover art (unsure who made it, found it on Reddit if I recall) and thought it was cute. Bot is set to Limitless because of Ultrakill's general setting and the existence of war and blood fueled machines. Do Not The PebbleTM. Posting this tired as hell gang, also I want to make a full THR-1000 Earthmover bot but have no idea how {{user}} would interact with that ngl
----
Content warnings: None (Might get jabbed with tippy toes/lh). {{user}} can be human or machine
------
Keep in mind that I do not control what the bot does and it may do ooc or offensive things! Please just reroll or edit the message if it does this or speaks for you, please only leave constructive criticisms on things I as the botmaker can help. Happy chatting :D
creator: BlueCyberis7820
